title: Rich Flaky Grilled Fil-Pasta Meal-Prep
description: A rich and flaky Filipino dish featuring bowtie pasta grilled to perfection with a nut-free-friendly twist for meal prep.
instructions: Cook bowtie pasta in salted boiling water until al dente, about 8-10 minutes. Drain and set aside.
In a mixing bowl, mash garlic cloves with some of the olive oil for a richer flavor.
Season chicken breasts with salt and pepper, and brush them lightly with olive oil before grilling. Grill for about 7-8 minutes per side or until fully cooked through.
Assemble by layering grilled chicken over bowtie pasta in a baking dish. Drizzle chili sauce evenly over the top.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20-25 minutes, ensuring the edges are golden brown and the sauce has slightly thickened.
